languages.text:
A powerful punch to the face! Can't be dodged or parried. Doesn't count as an attack.
Damage and Armor Penetration are increased by {uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each bonus turn given to another ally earlier. After using this ability, the bonus fades.

traits.locale_text:
A powerful punch to the face! Can't be dodged or parried. Doesn't count as an attack.
Damage and Armor Penetration are increased by {uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each bonus turn given to another ally earlier. After using this ability, the bonus fades.

languages.text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.
languages.original_text:
A powerful punch to the face! Can't be dodged or parried. Doesn't count as an attack.
Damage and Armor Penetration are increased by {uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each bonus turn given to another ally earlier. After using this ability, the bonus fades.

traits.locale_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its armour penetration are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each extra turn granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra turns are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be dodged or parried.
This ability does not count toward the attack limit per turn.

The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

The extra turns are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be dodged or parried.
This ability does not count toward the attack limit per turn.

The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

languages.text:
Урон, наносимый этой способностью, и ее {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитие брони{/g} увеличены на +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% за каждый {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, который Джай дала союзнику до использования этой способности. Счет дополнительных {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ходов{/g} начинается с момента последнего использования этой способности. Урон от этой способности нельзя отменить {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонением{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парированием{/g}.
Эта способность не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

Эта способность не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.

Урон, наносимый этой способностью, и ее {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитие брони{/g} увеличены на +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% за каждый {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, который Джай дала союзнику до использования этой способности. Урон от этой способности нельзя отменить {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонением{/g} или {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парированием{/g}.
Эта способность не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.

languages.text:
Les dégâts infligés par cette capacité et sa {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} augmentent de +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} % pour chaque {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} que Jae octroie à un allié avant de l'utiliser. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tours{/g} supplémentaires sont comptabilisés à partir de la dernière utilisation de cette capacité et les dégâts qu'elle inflige ne peuvent être ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivés{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parés{/g}.
Cette capacité n'est pas déduite du {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}nombre maximum d'attaques par tour{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Les dégâts infligés par cette capacité et sa {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} augmentent de +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} % pour chaque {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} que Jae octroie à un allié avant de l'utiliser. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tours{/g} supplémentaires sont comptabilisés à partir de la dernière utilisation de cette capacité et les dégâts qu'elle inflige ne peuvent être ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivés{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parés{/g}.
Cette capacité n'est pas déduite du {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}nombre maximum d'attaques par tour{/g}.

languages.text:
Bu kabiliyetin hasarı ve {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değeri, Jae'ın bu kabiliyeti kullanmadan önce bir dost birime kazandırdığı her {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} için +%{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} artar. Ek {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turlar{/g}, bu kabiliyetin en son kullanıldığı andan başlayarak sayılır. Bu kabiliyetin verdiği hasara karşı {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} yapılamaz.
Bu kabiliyet, {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g} sınırından sayılmaz.
languages.original_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Bu kabiliyetin hasarı ve {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değeri, Jae'ın bu kabiliyeti kullanmadan önce bir dost birime kazandırdığı her {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} için +%{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} artar. Bu kabiliyet, {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g} sınırından sayılmaz.

languages.text:
婕伊在使用此能力前每赋予盟友一个{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}，此能力的{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}和造成的伤害就提高{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}%。额外{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}从上次使用此能力后开始计算。此能力造成的伤害无法被{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}。
此能力不计入{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合的攻击上限{/g}。
languages.original_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
婕伊在使用此能力前每赋予盟友一个{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}，此能力的{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}和造成的伤害就提高{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}%。额外{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}从上次使用此能力后开始计算。此能力造成的伤害无法被{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}。
此能力不计入{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合的攻击上限{/g}。

languages.text:
El daño que inflige esta capacidad y su {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} aumentan un +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} % por cada {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno extra{/g} que Jae otorgue a un aliado antes de utilizar esta capacidad. Estos {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turnos{/g} extra se cuentan a partir del último uso de esta capacidad. El daño que inflige esta capacidad no se puede {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parar{/g}.
Esta capacidad no cuenta para el {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}límite de ataques por turno{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
El daño que inflige esta capacidad y su {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} aumentan un +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} % por cada {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno extra{/g} que Jae otorgue a un aliado antes de utilizar esta capacidad. Estos {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turnos{/g} extra se cuentan a partir del último uso de esta capacidad. El daño que inflige esta capacidad no se puede {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parar{/g}.
Esta capacidad no cuenta para el {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}límite de ataques por turno{/g}.

languages.text:
Der durch diese Fähigkeit verursachte Schaden und die {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} erhöht sich um +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} % für jeden {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}zusätzlichen Zug{/g}, den Jae Verbündeten vor dem Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit gewährt. Die zusätzlichen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Züge{/g} werden ab dem letzten Einsatz der Fähigkeit gezählt. Dem durch diese Fähigkeit verursachten Schaden kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausgewichen{/g} und er kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}pariert{/g} werden.
Diese Fähigkeit fließt nicht in {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}das Limit der Angriffe pro Zug{/g} ein.
languages.original_text:
The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Der durch diese Fähigkeit verursachte Schaden und die {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} erhöht sich um +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901} % für jeden {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}zusätzlichen Zug{/g}, den Jae Verbündeten vor dem Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit gewährt. Die zusätzlichen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Züge{/g} werden ab dem letzten Einsatz der Fähigkeit gezählt. Dem durch diese Fähigkeit verursachten Schaden kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausgewichen{/g} und er kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}pariert{/g} werden.
Diese Fähigkeit fließt nicht in {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}das Limit der Angriffe pro Zug{/g} ein.

languages.text:
このアビリティが与えるダメージとその{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}は、このアビリティを使用する前にジェイが味方に付与した{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}追加ターン{/g}1回につき+{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}%増加する。追加{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}は、このアビリティの最後の使用時から数え始める。このアビリティが与えるダメージは{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}も{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}受け流し{/g}もできない。
このアビリティは{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}ターンあたりの攻撃回数制限{/g}にカウントされない。

The damage dealt by this ability and its {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} are increased by +{uip|BonusDamage|e86fc99b6dd24e4a8b6657e252b85901}% for each {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} granted by Jae to an ally before using this ability. The extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turns{/g} are counted starting with the last use of this ability. The damage dealt by this ability cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}.
This ability does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

このアビリティは{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}ターンあたりの攻撃回数制限{/g}にカウントされない。
